note: Ahd is a vanilla-JS app (no React, no npm build) — outside the converter envelope. Layout is hand-authored per the skill's off-script clause: _ds_bundle.css is a verbatim copy of app/app.css (ship what was built), preview cards use the app's real class vocabulary, no JS bundle is shipped (no reimplementation). Scope: mini brand kit (tokens + core components) chosen for the AMAD deadline (judging 18 July).
